mapper.sql: id, perm_code permCode, perm_name permName, perm_url permUrl, perm_type permType, parent_id parentId, icon, sort_no sortNo, status, remark, create_date createDate, update_date updateDate
mapper.select:
select
from t_permission
or perm_code like concat('%', #{permCode}, '%')
or perm_name like concat('%', #{permName}, '%')
or perm_url like concat('%', #{permUrl}, '%')
order by parent_id asc, sort_no asc, id asc

select
from t_permission where status = 1 order by parent_id asc, sort_no asc, id asc

select
from t_permission where perm_code = #{permCode} limit 1

select
from t_permission where perm_url = #{permUrl} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into t_permission (perm_code, perm_name, perm_url, perm_type, parent_id, icon, sort_no, status, remark, create_date, update_date) values (#{permCode}, #{permName}, #{permUrl}, #{permType}, #{parentId}, #{icon}, #{sortNo}, #{status}, #{remark}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update t_permission set perm_code = #{permCode}, perm_name = #{permName}, perm_url = #{permUrl}, perm_type = #{permType}, parent_id = #{parentId}, icon = #{icon}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_date = now() where id = #{id}
